allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "D:\\100 제안서 DB" -Recurse -Depth 2 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Extension -match "hwpx?|docx|xlsx|pdf" } | Select-Object FullName -First 30)

PowerShell($xml = Get-Content "D:\\ax\\.tmp_hwpx\\Contents\\section0.xml" -Raw; Write-Output \("총 길이: " + $xml.Length + " chars"\); Write-Output \("줄 수: " + \($xml -split "`n"\).Count\); Write-Output \("<hp:tbl> 개수: " + \([regex]::Matches\($xml, '<hp:tbl '\)\).Count\); Write-Output \("<hp:tr> 개수: " + \([regex]::Matches\($xml, '<hp:tr '\)\).Count\); Write-Output \("<hp:tc> 개수: " + \([regex]::Matches\($xml, '<hp:tc '\)\).Count\))
